hook.summary: Homer Simpson checks his poker hand and grins with confidence.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of yellow hands revealing a pair of 7s, followed by Homer's wide, toothy grin.

scene_flow: Homer reveals a pair of 7s and smiles confidently at the poker table.
Reaction shots of other Springfield characters looking intimidated by his bet.
Homer pushes a massive stack of chips into the pot as the table glows.
Final title card for 'Hold'em or Fold'em' with app store links.
cta_text: Available on the App Store / GET IT ON Google Play
audience_proxy: Adult fans of The Simpsons and casual poker players looking for a themed gambling experience.
